meaning: n.块状软物,填料vt.把...卷为一卷,填塞,以软物衬填
examples: The nurse used a wad of cotton wool to stop the bleeding.
The flies settled on Satan again. He sneezed a wad of snot onto the dash.
Put a wad of paper under the leg of the table to make it level.
But locals say Abu Shukri (63 Al-Wad Road, 972-02-627-1538) has the best hummus in the Holy City.
Pharmacia is suddenly looking at a fat wad of cash--but what can it do with it?
